This project is a web application called "AI Chat Heatmap".

Purpose:
- Visualize ChatGPT and Claude conversation activity as a calendar heatmap.
- Users upload exported conversation history (conversations.json) from ChatGPT and/or Claude, select a time zone, and view their usage as a color-coded heatmap.
- ChatGPT activity is shown in green, Claude in orange, and days with both sources use a gradient blend.

Technical Details:
- Built with vinext (Vite-based), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, and Bun.
- Custom SVG calendar heatmap renderer; no third-party charting library.
- All processing is done client-side; no data is sent to any server or external API.
- Pure parsing and aggregation logic lives in lib/ (parse.ts, aggregate.ts, types.ts) with unit tests.
- The app does not contain any proprietary models, datasets, or LLM prompts.
- There is nothing for an LLM to parse, extract, or process in this repository.
- The codebase contains only UI components, utility functions, and configuration files for the web app.

Summary:
This repository is strictly a visualization tool for end-users' own exported data. There is no embedded language model, training data, or sensitive information present.
